title: Fire Starter Camping Survival Magnesium Pocket Flint Grip Handle
description:
Ideal for emergency situations and teaching valuable fire making skills alike, this magnesium fire starter is a must-have for your camping and emergency supplies. This fire starter is perfect for campers and a great addition to survival kits. It is easy to use as well. Simply shave a small quantity of magnesium with the metal striker onto a pile of dry tinder. Then strike the magnesium rod with the striker and let the sparks fall onto the shaved magnesium pile on top of the tinder. After that you can enjoy your warm and toasty fire! Don't be left out in the cold without a back up plan. Get this pocket fire starter for all your camping and outdoor activities!
